name: Idle Zombie Wave: Premium
short_description: A thrilling tower defense survival game where you lead a team of survivors against relentless zombie hordes. Deploy unique fighters, strategize with adjutants, and adapt using roguelike upgrades. Defend your home, battle epic bosses, and survive the apocalypse!
detailed_description:
Zombies are invading, and the world is on the brink of collapse! In this apocalyptic survival clash, you will command a team of survivors as a smart and decisive leader. The undead horde is relentless, and only you can lead the survivors in this tower defense (TD) battle to defend your home from wave after wave of the undead.

Game Features:

· Massive Zombie Waves

Brace yourself for an epic survival challenge with endless waves of the undead horde. The number of enemies will exceed your wildest expectations.

· Diverse Survivor Roster

Choose from over 30 unique survivors, each armed with distinct weapons and attack styles. Build the ultimate defense team to clash with the zombie horde.

· Adjutant System

Transform your team's gameplay with different adjutants. Change the tide of battle and overpower the undead with strategic adjutant combinations.

· Roguelike Elements

Discover over 200 unique roguelike items to assist in your survival. Adapt your strategy with every bullet and item to withstand the onslaught.

· Epic Boss Battles

Face off against formidable zombie bosses in thrilling TD clashes. Defend your tower and survive the toughest survival challenges.

Join the battle against the zombie apocalypse! Command your survivors, clash with the undead, and become the ultimate defender in this relentless zombie survival game!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Ukrainian, Russian, Hungarian, Indonesian, Turkish, Japanese, Polish, Thai, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Dutch, Vietnamese, Arabic, Korean, Hindi, Filipino, Portuguese - Brazil
